description: User builds interconnected character relationships: family, rivals, mentors

turns.content: Create a character: Kael Stormborn, a 28-year-old human ranger who patrols the Whispering Woods.
Created Kael Stormborn, 28, human ranger, Whispering Woods patrol.
His mother is Sera Stormborn, a retired knight who lost her left arm in the Siege of Ashvale.
Created Sera Stormborn, Kael's mother, retired knight, lost left arm at Siege of Ashvale.
His father Darius Stormborn died when Kael was 10. He was poisoned by a political rival named Lord Cassian Vex.
Created Darius Stormborn (deceased) and Lord Cassian Vex. Vex poisoned Darius.
Kael has a twin sister named Lyra who is a healer at the Temple of Dawn. They're very close.
Created Lyra Stormborn, Kael's twin sister, healer at Temple of Dawn.
Kael's mentor is an old elf named Thandril who taught him tracking and survival. Thandril is 400 years old.
Created Thandril, elf, 400 years old, Kael's mentor in tracking and survival.
Kael has a wolf companion named Frost. Frost has a distinctive scar across his muzzle from a bear fight.
Created Frost, Kael's wolf companion, muzzle scar from bear fight.
Lord Cassian Vex is now the governor of Ashvale. He has a daughter named Elise who is secretly in love with Kael.
Updated Vex as Ashvale governor. Created Elise Vex, secret love interest for Kael.
Kael's best friend is a dwarf blacksmith named Brogan Deepforge. Brogan made Kael's signature weapon: a bow called Whisperwind.
Created Brogan Deepforge, dwarf blacksmith, crafted Whisperwind bow for Kael.
There's an ongoing threat: a group called the Hollowed who are corrupted forest spirits. Kael has been tracking them for 3 years.
Created the Hollowed, corrupted forest spirits. Kael tracking them for 3 years.
The leader of the Hollowed is a fallen druid named Morwen who was once Thandril's apprentice.
Created Morwen, fallen druid, ex-apprentice of Thandril, leads the Hollowed.

facts.fact: Kael Stormborn is 28 years old, human ranger in Whispering Woods
Mother Sera lost left arm at Siege of Ashvale
Father Darius was poisoned by Lord Cassian Vex when Kael was 10
Twin sister Lyra is a healer at Temple of Dawn
Wolf companion Frost has muzzle scar from bear fight
Cassian Vex is now governor of Ashvale, has daughter Elise
Elise Vex is secretly in love with Kael
Brogan Deepforge crafted Whisperwind bow for Kael
The Hollowed are corrupted forest spirits, Kael tracking for 3 years
Morwen leads the Hollowed, was Thandril's former apprentice
